metadata.title: tarot-spark
metadata.description: Draw tarot cards and create an AI-ready reflection prompt.

heading: Draw three cards and turn them into an AI-ready tarot prompt.
intro: Pick a topic, draw a compact spread, then copy a prompt designed for reflective tarot writing.
blockedAction: Browser permission blocked that action. You can still select and copy the prompt manually.
emptyBody: The first draw creates a three-card spread and a prompt you can use with an AI writing tool.
disclaimer: Tarot content is for entertainment and self-reflection only. It is not medical, legal, financial, investment, or mental-health advice.
